status: Stage S3 (L2/L3/L4 Build) IN PROGRESS 3/5 — S3.T3 eaasp-l3-governance COMPLETE @ 0907d13. New Python FastAPI service at tools/eaasp-l3-governance/ (port 8083) implementing thin L3 governance: Contract 1 Policy Deployment (PUT /v1/policies/managed-hooks + GET /v1/policies/versions + PUT /v1/policies/{hook_id}/mode), Contract 4 Telemetry Ingest (POST+GET /v1/telemetry/events), Contract 5 partial Session validate (POST /v1/sessions/{id}/validate handshake stub). SQLite schema: managed_settings_versions (append-only versioned JSON blobs), managed_hooks_mode_overrides (upsert-in-place, floats above versions), telemetry_events (session-indexed PostToolUse payloads). Tests 28/28 (9 policy_engine + 6 audit + 3 session_validate + 10 api): `cd tools/eaasp-l3-governance && uv run pytest`. RuFlo swarm-1775925175221 trace: coder single-pass 26/26 first run → reviewer APPROVE-WITH-COMMENTS (no Criticals, 3 Major M1-M3 deferred, 4 Minor) → R1+R2 tests applied inline (sanitize serializer round-trip + 10x concurrent deploy contiguous versions) → 28/28 final. Design decisions: (1) mode overrides as separate table not version bump so history stays meaningful, (2) _sanitize_errors() projects Pydantic v2 ValidationError.ctx to JSON-safe dict preventing 500s, (3) ManagedSettings ConfigDict(extra='allow') for forward-compat, (4) received_at as TEXT for lexicographic since-query ordering, (5) hook_matches() strict wildcard semantics (None/'*' matches all, missing field on constrained hook does NOT match). Inherits S3.T2 C1 (BEGIN IMMEDIATE), C3 (limit clamp ≤500), M4 (mode state transition), N4 (404/422 status map), WAL+foreign_keys. Out of scope (Phase 3): approval gates, OPA, evidence chain, policy DSL compile, cross-tenant inheritance, PRE_POLICY_DEPLOY emission. 19 new Deferred (D1-D19): MCP facade / mode history / DSL compile / approval / OPA / evidence chain / rate limit / error taxonomy / deny-precedence resolver / integration test / lifecycle event / contract test / SQLite RETURNING / _sanitize_errors backport / version retention / telemetry TTL / global exception handler / structured logging / pyrightconfig. Plan progress 10/15. Next: S3.T4 eaasp-l4-orchestration (Session Orchestrator + 3-way handshake initiator + Intent Gateway + Event Stream placeholder, port 8084).
